expected_behavior: Tenant export contains only authorized rows; privileged backup is complete, restore preserves RLS/policies/audit, and filtered backups cannot silently omit protected rows.
given: Tenant-scoped export and privileged full backup/restore paths exist.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Backup manifest, restored counts/hashes, RLS inventory before/after, tenant export diff.
then: Tenant export contains only authorized rows; privileged backup is complete, restore preserves RLS/policies/audit, and filtered backups cannot silently omit protected rows.
verification_method: Automated local backup/restore and per-tenant export tests with row/hash counts.
when: Exports and a local backup→restore rehearsal run.
